Hacker News

#1
AI 2072 热度 1191 回复

Kimi K3：开放前沿智能

Kimi K3: Open Frontier Intelligence

Today, we are introducing Kimi K3 — our most capable model. Kimi K3 is a 2.8T-parameter model built on our Kimi Delta Attention and Attention Residuals, with native vision capabilities and a 1-million-token context window. It is the world's first open 3T-class model, designed for frontier intelligence across long-horizon coding, knowledge work, and reasoning. While its overall performance still trails the most powerful proprietary models, Claude Fable 5 and GPT 5.6 Sol, Kimi K3 demonstrated frontier-level performance across our evaluation suite, consistently outperforming other tested models.

vincent_s 3 天前 www.kimi.com
详情 原帖
#2
云服务 1291 热度 745 回复

AWS：预估账单数据不准确——17亿美元

AWS: Inaccurate Estimated Billing Data – $1.7 billion

AWS 出现计费系统故障，有用户显示预估账单高达 17 亿美元，而正常用量不足 5 美元

nprateem 2 天前 Hacker News
  • AWS 计费系统出现严重故障，账单金额异常放大数千倍
  • 多个用户报告相同问题，表明是系统性故障而非个案
  • AWS 官方健康状态页面已确认问题存在

LG显示器未经用户同意通过Windows更新静默安装软件

LG monitors silently install software through Windows Update without consent

baranul 1 天前 videocardz.com
  • LG显示器通过Windows Update渠道静默推送软件安装。
  • 用户未收到任何提示或授权请求。
  • 引发对硬件厂商权限边界的讨论。
详情 原帖
#4
AI 1215 热度 292 回复

Inkling：我们的开放权重模型

Inkling: Our Open-Weights Model

Our mission is to build AI that extends human will and judgment. We have developed a platform that lets anyone customize models, previewed an AI system built for interactive collaboration, and published novel research. Today we are advancing our mission by releasing a model we trained from scratch with the full weights available, so that people can make it their own. Our model, called Inkling, is a Mixture-of-Experts transformer with 975B total parameters, 41B active. It supports a context window of up to 1M tokens. It was pretrained on 45 trillion tokens of text, images, audio and video. It is the first in a family of models of different sizes: alongside it we are sharing a preview of Inkling-Small, a lighter-weight model with 12B active parameters, trained with a similar recipe, that achieves strong performance with even lower cost and latency. Inkling reasons natively over text, images, and audio, and balances cost with performance through efficient and controllable thinking effort. We trained it to be a broad, balanced foundation model: strong across many domains, flexible enough to adapt. Inkling is not the strongest overall model available today, open or closed. Instead, a combination of qualities makes it a good open-weights base for customization: multimodal capabilities, efficient thinking, and availability on Tinker for fine-tuning. Inkling is just the start: our first release in a model family we will continue to build on. We want to make customization accessible for more use cases, so Inkling is available for fine-tuning on Tinker today. Picking the right base model to fine-tune is a qualitative judgment that combines measurable benchmarks with the unique feel of a model that comes from playing with it. To enable the latter we’re adding the Inkling Playground in the Tinker console: a developer-facing interface for chatting with Inkling. To show what customization means in practice, we asked Inkling to fine-tune itself. Using Tinker, the model wrote its own fine-tuning job, ran it, and evaluated the result:

vimarsh6739 3 天前 thinkingmachines.ai
详情 原帖
#5
AI 522 热度 506 回复

Kimi K3 时刻

The Kimi K3 Moment

I’ve been running Kimi K3 alongside Claude on my normal coding work, and for all practical purposes I can’t tell them apart. Same tasks, same quality of output, and near identical token counts to get there. I expected an open model to be sloppier or to grind through more tokens on the way to the same answer, and neither turned out to be true.

sbochins 23 小时前 stephen.bochinski.dev
详情 原帖
#6
AI 393 热度 528 回复

100美元AI音乐视频：Claude Fable 5 对决 GPT-5.6 Sol

$100 AI Music Video: Claude Fable 5 vs. GPT-5.6 Sol

We built a small agentic harness with one job: hand a model a song, a hard dollar budget, and a set of tools, then get out of the way and let it produce a full music video on its own. The model researches which video models exist, generates clips, watches its own footage, edits with ffmpeg, and assembles a final cut. A few readers of our last build-off said they wanted to see how tool use actually varies between models, so we gave frontier-level models an open-ended, long-horizon task where each model decides on its own what to research, what to generate, and how to edit. We log every tool call, so you can see exactly how each one worked (full transcripts below). We ran two models, Claude Fable 5 and GPT-5.6 Sol, each at two budgets ($25 and $100), for four runs total. Every run got the same song (Bruno Mars and Mark Ronson's "Uptown Funk"), a short text description, and a time-stamped lyric transcript. The setup Each model ran an autonomous tool-calling loop with six tools:

hershyb_ 2 天前 www.tryai.dev
详情 原帖

科技产品 694 热度 440 回复

索尼从“购买”了这些影片的用户账户中删除更多电影

Sony deletes more movies from the accounts of people who ‘bought’ them

索尼再次从PlayStation Store用户账户中删除数百部已购买的电影和电视节目，原因是与StudioCanal的授权协议终止。

nekusar 3 天前 www.techdirt.com
  • 索尼因授权协议变动多次删除用户已购内容，影响德国、奥地利及美国用户。
  • 用户购买的是临时使用许可而非内容所有权，许可可随时被撤销且无补偿。
  • 索尼通过复杂的条款和条件故意模糊消费者对所购内容性质的理解。

  • 缺乏高危操作警告提示，用户容易误操作导致设备锁死

我开发了一个开源版 Surge，把 Mac 变成可导入规则、可按设备分流的全屋透明代理网关。

开发者推出开源项目 OpenSurge for Mac，可将 Mac 变为支持规则导入和设备分流的全屋透明代理网关。

wsy95613373 9 小时前 v2ex.com
  • 开源替代 Surge，提供类似体验且功能强大。
  • 支持按设备分流策略，满足多样化网络需求。
  • 兼容 mihomo 配置和订阅，便于迁移和扩展。

#3
AI 3 热度 3 回复

实测 GPT-5.6 Sol 的 High/Max：修 bug 未必值得上 Max，重写/迁移可能值得

实测 GPT-5.6 Sol 的 High/Max：修 bug 未必值得上 Max，重写/迁移可能值得

作者实测 GPT-5.6 Sol 的 High 与 Max 模式在 DeepSWE 和 eza 重写任务中的表现，发现 Max 并非全面优于 High。

yohjisakamoto 2 小时前 v2ex.com
  • 范围明确的 bug 修复任务中，High 通过率 64.3% 反而高于 Max 的 57.1%。
  • 功能实现任务 Max 通过率提升 4.4 个百分点，仓库重写任务提升 4.8–13.5 个百分点。
  • Max 模式成本为 High 的 2.42 倍，输出 token 2.11 倍，输入 2.91 倍，时间 1.90 倍。
详情 原帖
#4
AI 3 热度 3 回复

为什么“节省 90% Token”不等于 Coding Agent 总成本降低 90%

为什么“节省 90% Token”不等于 Coding Agent 总成本降低 90%

作者通过配对实验测试了多个 Token 节省插件在完整仓库重写任务中的表现，发现宣传的“节省 90% Token”并不能直接等同于总成本降低 90%。

yohjisakamoto 4 小时前 v2ex.com
  • Token 节省插件在完整仓库任务中的实际效果与宣传存在显著差异。
  • 缓存输入占据绝大部分 Token 和成本，模型输出占比极低。
  • 组内运行波动较大，小样本难以证明插件的因果效果。
详情 原帖

0xroot 1 小时前 v2ex.com
  • 针对科研人员和开发者读英文论文的痛点，提供 AI 驱动的沉浸式阅读体验。
  • 图表、代码、公式结构化保留，解决传统翻译工具排版混乱问题。
  • AI 自动生成双语大纲并支持点击跳转，快速定位论文关键内容。
